category_sources: source_facts.description says Cloud Development Kit for Terraform; official HashiCorp README says CDKTF defines infrastructure resources using programming constructs and provisions with Terraform.
display_name_sources: Official HashiCorp repository and documentation use CDK for Terraform and CDKTF; source_facts.name is cdktf for the CLI formula.
docs_sources: Official HashiCorp Developer CDKTF page is the dedicated documentation surface; official GitHub README links to CDKTF documentation and migration notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official HashiCorp GitHub repository and the official README shows the clone URL for hashicorp/terraform-cdk.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cdktf; official HashiCorp README describes CDKTF CLI/library support for TypeScript, Python, Java, C#, Go, and Terraform provisioning.
